content:
# Internal: Deposit Account Tool Reference

## Account Opening Command
Use `open_bank_account_5464` only after the deposit account opening eligibility workflow supports opening the requested account. See "Internal: Deposit Account Opening Eligibility" before calling it.

- Tool template: `open_bank_account_{suffix}`
- Action type: `WRITE`
- KB unlock required: `True`
- Required arguments: `user_id, account_type, account_class`
- Affected record set: accounts

The caller must supply the customer identifier, selected deposit account type, and selected account class through the required argument set. Do not infer a missing selection from a comparison discussion.

## Account Closure Command
Use `close_bank_account_1097` only when the closure policy allows the requested account to be closed. See "Internal: Deposit Account Closure Policy" for the customer and account checks that come before the tool call.

- Tool template: `close_bank_account_{suffix}`
- Action type: `WRITE`
- KB unlock required: `True`
- Required arguments: `account_id`
- Optional arguments: `reason, waive_early_closure_fee`
- Affected record set: accounts

Use optional closure inputs only when the conversation or closure policy supplies the reason or supports waiving the early closure fee.

## Unlock and Execution Rules
Both commands are assistant-callable, agent-discoverable after KB lookup, and state-changing. Locate the exact tool name in the KB, unlock it by that exact name, and call it through the runtime wrapper. If any required value is absent, ask one focused follow-up before taking action.
title: Internal: Deposit Account Tool Reference
